_comment: MERGE these two blocks into your ~/.claude/settings.json (do not overwrite the whole file). 'permissions.allow' lets the recall/capture skills run memory-engine without a prompt; 'hooks.UserPromptSubmit' wires per-turn auto-retrieval. The hook command uses the PATH-resolved 'memory-engine'; if Claude Code can't resolve it on Windows, use the absolute path to the uv-tool shim instead, e.g. C:/Users/<you>/.local/bin/memory-engine.exe
